name: Mehendi
subtitle: Colourful jewellery for the mehendi celebration
description: The mehendi ceremony is all about colour, joy, and playful elegance. Our mehendi jewellery collection features vibrant multi-coloured pieces, delicate floral designs, and lightweight sets perfect for dancing and fun.
styling_tips: Opt for colourful multi-stone jewellery for the mehendi. Floral motifs and lighter pieces work beautifully. Pair with bangles in complementary colours.
meta_description: Shop mehendi jewellery at Ria Art Jewellery Mumbai. Colourful jewellery sets for the mehendi ceremony.
